title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
